e33chat.screen.title: Chat
e33chat.config.title: ChatBubble Settings
e33chat.config.theme.desc: UI color scheme: dark or light
e33chat.config.enabled.desc: Disable to restore the vanilla chat screen
e33chat.config.red_dot.desc: Show an unread red dot on the HUD chat icon
e33chat.config.hide_chat_icon.desc: Hide the HUD chat icon (red dot included); chat key still works
e33chat.config.animation.desc: Slide animation when opening/closing the chat screen
e33chat.config.debug_log.desc: Write message-pipeline details to latest.log; enable when troubleshooting message routing
e33chat.config.own_bubble_color.desc: Bubble background for your messages (hex RRGGBB)
e33chat.config.other_bubble_color.desc: Bubble background for other players' messages (hex RRGGBB)
e33chat.config.own_text_color.desc: Text color inside your bubbles (hex RRGGBB)
e33chat.config.other_text_color.desc: Text color inside other players' bubbles (hex RRGGBB)
e33chat.config.strong_hint.desc: Pop system messages above the hotbar; if off they go to the message preview
e33chat.config.mention_strong_hint.desc: Pop a hint above the hotbar when you are @mentioned or quoted
e33chat.config.system_chat_as_bubble.des: Show system messages as bubbles (System identity + default avatar); off = plain gray text
e33chat.config.anti_spam.desc: Collapse consecutive identical messages into one bubble with a counter
e33chat.config.chat_history.desc: Save chat history per world/server and restore it on rejoin
e33chat.config.chat_report_compat.desc: Enable on servers with NCR/FreedomChat: restores player chat converted to system messages back into bubbles
e33chat.config.preview_enabled.desc: Show recent messages above the HUD icon while chat is closed
e33chat.config.time_separator.desc: Insert a timestamp divider in the chat list at this interval; Off disables it
